data.name: CompactSubgrid_Desc
data.value: Generic condensed subgrid with auto-detected expandable detail panels

data.name: records_Desc
data.value: Dataset binding for the subgrid records

data.name: conditionalFields_Desc
data.value: Comma-separated list of field logical names to move into the expandable detail panel (e.g. syg_companyname,syg_buyer,syg_saledate). Fields listed here will NOT be shown in the main grid columns. All other fields follow automatic detection based on data sparsity.

data.name: isManyToMany_Desc
data.value: Enable for N:N (many-to-many) subgrids. When enabled, the "+ New" button becomes "+ Add existing" (opens a lookup picker), and "Delete" becomes "Remove" (disassociates the record instead of deleting it). Requires the Relationship Name property to be set.

data.name: relationshipName_Desc
data.value: The N:N relationship schema name (e.g. syg_kycprofile_syg_document). Required when Many-to-Many Mode is enabled. You can find this in the Power Apps maker portal under Tables > Relationships.
